Package nonprofitbookkeeping.api

Interface AccountDetails

AccountDetailsImpl
public interface AccountDetails

  • Method Details

    • getAccountNumber

      String getAccountNumber()
      Gets the account number.
      Returns:
      The account number.

    • getIncreaseSide

      AccountSide getIncreaseSide()
      Gets the side where the account increases.
      Returns:
      The side where the account increases.

    • getEffectiveIncreaseSide

      default AccountSide getEffectiveIncreaseSide()
      Returns the effective increase side for this account. Implementations may override to provide a derived value, but by default this simply returns getIncreaseSide().
      Returns:
      the effective increase side

    • getName

      String getName()
      Gets the name of the account.
      Returns:
      The name of the account.

    • setAccountNumber

      void setAccountNumber(String accountNumber)
      Sets the account number.
      Parameters:
      accountNumber - The account number to set.

    • setIncreaseSide

      void setIncreaseSide(AccountSide increaseSide)
      Sets the side where the account increases.
      Parameters:
      increaseSide - The side where the account increases.

    • setName

      void setName(String name)
      Sets the name of the account.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the account to set.

    • getAccountName

      String getAccountName()
      Gets the name of the account. This method seems redundant with getName().
      Returns:
      The name of the account.

    • getAccountCode

      String getAccountCode()
      Gets the account code.
      Returns:
      The account code.

    • getAccountType

      String getAccountType()
      Gets the account type.
      Returns:
      The account type.

    • getParentAccount

      String getParentAccount()
      Gets the parent account identifier.
      Returns:
      The parent account number or ID.

    • getCurrency

      String getCurrency()
      Gets the currency of the account.
      Returns:
      The currency of the account.

    • getOpeningBalance

      BigDecimal getOpeningBalance()
      Gets the opening balance of the account.
      Returns:
      The opening balance of the account.

    • equals

      boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - The reference object with which to compare.
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the obj argument; false otherwise.
